parameters.query: SELECT *, date_added::text AS date_added FROM outreach_leads ORDER BY created_at ASC
UPDATE outreach_leads SET status = 'Enriching', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.id }} RETURNING *, date_added::text AS date_added
UPDATE outreach_leads SET status = 'Not_Found', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.id }} RETURNING *, date_added::text AS date_added

parameters.query: SELECT id, email, status FROM outreach_leads WHERE email IS NOT NULL
